name: Wobbly Move
description: Drag transition where the window turns to jelly around the pointer, in the spirit of the classic wobbly windows. The area under the cursor follows the pointer while the rest of the window replays the drag path a moment late, sweeping through curves behind it and ringing softly to rest when you let go. Reach, lag, ring and maximum bend are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Reach
parameters.description: How far from the pointer the jelly zone extends (px), smaller values make a stiffer window

parameters.name: Lag
parameters.description: How far behind the drag path the far side of the window trails (ms)

parameters.name: Ring
parameters.description: Strength of the spring-back overshoot after release, where 0 stops dead

parameters.name: Maximum bend
parameters.description: Cap on how far any part of the window may trail (px)
